page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6r.16xlarge is an ARM64-based compute-optimized server powered by a 2.8 GHz Ampere Altra processor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, paired with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor, lacks local storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Benchmark results show strong multi-core performance, highlighted by a stress-ng multi-core score of 114,420.62 and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression speed of 418.6 GB/sec. Memory subsystem performance is strong for small-block cached read operations at 4,547.79 GB/sec, while large-block uncached read and write operations perform in the average range. Single-core performance is moderate, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1,789.29 and a weak single-threaded bzip3 decompression rate of 8.38 GB/sec. Redis SET operations demonstrate high throughput at 84.36 million operations per second.

The ARM64 architecture of the Ampere Altra processor delivers high compute density and power efficiency, translating to a cost-effective profile for multi-threaded workloads. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes this instance well-suited for compute-intensive applications that scale horizontally across many cores. Recommended workloads include multi-threaded data compression, high-throughput Redis caching, static web serving, and containerized microservices.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6r.16xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated physical cores powered by a 2.8 GHz Ampere Altra processor. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps without local storage. The instance demonstrates strong multi-core capabilities, as evidenced by high multi-threaded decompression and stress-ng multi-core benchmark scores, alongside exceptional Redis SET throughput of 84.36 million operations per second. Conversely, single-core performance is moderate, with weaker single-threaded decompression results. This hardware profile offers a cost-efficient solution for highly parallelized workloads. It is best suited for multi-threaded data processing, high-throughput caching, static web serving, and containerized microservices.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6r.16xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized server with 64 dedicated Ampere Altra cores, 128 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and Redis performance.

tagline: An ARM64 compute-optimized server delivering 64 dedicated cores and high multi-threaded performance for parallel workloads and high-throughput caching.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated ARM64 Ampere Altra cores running at 2.8 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong multi-core CPU and multi-threaded decompression performance
High-throughput Redis performance reaching 84.36 million operations per second
Optimized for multi-threaded data processing, web serving, and caching
